Pagphera Rasam A ceremonial welcome, with the whole family
🎉 Sunday, 5th July  ·  7:00 PM
A Little Note
Better late, than never

Sneha & Ravi,

You got married on the 4th of December, 2025, and what a grand celebration it was! Filled with love, laughter, cherished moments, and the blessings of everyone around, it truly was a wedding to remember.

With life keeping us busy after the wedding festivities, we couldn't celebrate the Pagphera Rasam at the time, but some traditions are simply worth waiting for. And now, the time has finally come.

With great joy, we warmly invite you and your family to join us as we celebrate your Pagphera Rasam, an evening filled with love, laughter, blessings, and togetherness.

We can't wait to welcome you home and celebrate this beautiful tradition together.

Moments We Cherish
From Engagement to Vows
Two hearts, one dance, forever ours.
In his eyes, she found home.
The ring said forever, hearts agreed.
A promise sealed with trembling hands.
Dressed in love, ready for forever.
Off they go, colors trailing behind.
Laughter looks good on newlyweds.
Turmeric, tears, and so much love.
Waving hello to a lifetime together.
Bubbles, blessings, and a whole lot of love.
Under city lights, forever felt closer.
A quiet kiss under a loud sky.
Sparks flew, and so did their hearts.
The sky lit up with their joy.
Around the sacred fire, forever begins.
Flowers exchanged, hearts already spoken for.
She twirled into her happily ever after.
Hand in hand, into forever they walked.
Every color of the story — the promise, the rituals, the big day.
